title: LAB FOUAVE Magnetic Stirrer 200-3500rpm，Maximum stirring capacity 3000ml，Suitable for schools, work, or experimental projects，Laboratory Mini Magnetic Mixer Stirrer(No Heating)
description:
【Strong stirring】 The speed range of the magnetic stirrer is 200-3500RPM, and the desired effect can be achieved by changing and selecting the appropriate speed through the knob on the instrument.
【Durable use】PVC materials have excellent wear resistance, chemical resistance, and long service life. Brushless DC motors operate stably and quietly, with high strength and long service life.
【 Compact and portable】The magnetic stirrer has a small volume, light weight, and is easy to carry and use. It also has a capacity of 3000ML, achieving small volume and large capacity
【Multiple available scenarios】The FOUAVE magnetic mixer is suitable for stirring in school laboratories, industry, agriculture, health, and medicine, and can also be used for home brewing, home chemistry, and more.
【After-sale service】 We provide a one-year warranty service. If you have any quality problems during use, please contact us and we will provide you with timely service.
reviews_5s:
I drop the pill in a bottle, and start dumping sugar. This keeps it mixed really well, letting it dissolve to saturation at room temp. Much easier than my other various attempts.

The pill just stays inside, which is probably fine. The stirrer goes way faster than the bottle will support, and slow speed is in fact pretty slow.Met my expectations, works perfectly, bigger than expected looks smaller in the picture, great price for the size, happyThis magnetic stirrer is ideal for laboratory experiments or mixing solutions at home. It has a strong stirring capacity and is suitable for various liquid volumes, making it a reliable tool for scientific and culinary applications.If you like gadges, you'll have fun with this for a few minutes, or for a classroom of little kids. It uses a magnet to stir things with. We don't have a lab, so we just used it to stir our drinks. Why not?I was using a pathetic homemade stir plate for so long that it's somewhat embarrassing looking at what this model costs, which is more than sufficient for my needs and beyond. Perhaps I should have held out for a heated version, but that adds a layer of complexity and sophistication that a plain stirrer avoids. There are plenty of occasions were just stirring is sufficient and when it isn't I can bring a heated vessel over, no need for the two devices to be combined.The LAB FOUAVE Magnetic Stirrer is a budget-friendly option that works well enough for casual use. While it's not lab-grade, it performs adequately for simple mixing tasks. At this price point, it’s a good deal for basic stirring needs. Works well with other magnetic stir rods as well. When I first turned it on it made an awful sound and would not spin, I ended up removing the feet and unscrewing the screws under the feet to open the unit up. Inside I found that the cable that goes to the control knob was blocking the motion of the motor, I simply bent the cable so it was unlikely to move up towards the motor, taped it in place then closed it up and it works great. Clearly the cable should have been secured in the factory but the fix was super easy and took about 3 minutes.This isn't a high end magnetic stirrer, but it does work and it works fine. It's pretty much what I expected it to be for the price. Does what I need it to do, and it's at a low enough price point that even though it feels like it probably won't last years and years, I'm comfortable with that. Not bad. Does what I need.The magnetic stirrer is exactly as it is described. I use it for my mycology projects to stir the liquid culture, with a proper magnetic bar inside the jar, it stirs it with no issues at all and with ease. It is very nice. Works as described.The LAB FOUAVE Magnetic Stirrer is an excellent tool for anyone involved in scientific research or educational projects. With a stirring speed range of 200-3500rpm and a maximum stirring capacity of 3000ml, it offers great versatility for various applications. This mini magnetic mixer is perfect for schools, work, or experimental projects, providing reliable and consistent performance. The compact design makes it easy to fit into any lab setup, and its user-friendly interface ensures straightforward operation. Although it doesn't have a heating function, its efficiency in mixing solutions more than makes up for it. Overall, this magnetic stirrer is a valuable addition to any laboratory, offering precision and convenience. Highly recommended!This magnetic stir has great performance and speed to mix paints, oils, and does a great job. Super low in noise, and a great fit for any desk size. Recommended
reviews_1s:
I was overly excited to use this product but when I tried using it the magnet would not turn. I could not figure out what was going on, but it didn’t work. I contacted someone and asked about it, but got no resolution so I took it apart. The reason it did not work was because someone had trapped a wire right over the spinning device locking it in place. So it never would have turned. The design looks like this would be a real common thing with the way it’s constructed, so I definitely do not recommend this product. Unless you like tinkering on things I’d say pass.

Otherwise the quality of the parts seemed average at best, and I did like its compact size.
